cleavage agent: we incubated Mtb in a sucrose buffer with two different concentrations of trypsin (0.4 μg/mL and 0.05 μg/mL, Methods)
collision energy: the full MS scan was followed by MS/MS for as many precursor ions in a two second cycle with a NCE of 36
instrument: using a ThermoFisher Orbitrap Exploris 480 mass spectrometer.
labeling: Peptides for mass spectrometry were prepared for TMT analysis according to the manufacturer’s instructions.
